Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 212 

LIMITED_GAP_BENEFIT_TYPE 

LABEL: Types of Drugs Offered for Limited Gap Coverage 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the types of drugs the plan offers as part of the limited benefit above ICL. This 
limited benefit is not considered Gap Coverage. The value contains a string of binary digits; each digit 
of the value indicates which types of drugs are offered through the
